languages.text: "Неумирающий дает своим слугам те шансы, которые они заслуживают. Твой еще впереди".

traits.locale_text: "Неумирающий дает своим слугам те шансы, которые они заслуживают. Твой еще впереди".
traits.speaker: KibellahCompanion

languages.text: "The Undying One grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."
languages.original_text: "Неумирающий дает своим слугам те шансы, которые они заслуживают. Твой еще впереди".

traits.locale_text: "The Undying grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."
"The Undying grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."
"The Undying One grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."
"The Undying One grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."
"The Undying One grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."

languages.text: «El Inmortal concede a sus siervos las oportunidades que merecen. La suya está por llegar».
languages.original_text: "The Undying One grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."

traits.locale_text: «El Inmortal concede a sus siervos las oportunidades que merecen. La suya está por llegar».

languages.text: “不死之神会将机会赐予祂的仆人。而属于你的那一次，尚未来临。”
languages.original_text: "The Undying One grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."

traits.locale_text: “不死之神会将机会赐予祂的仆人。而属于你的那一次，尚未来临。”

languages.text: « L'Immortel accorde à ses serviteurs les opportunités qu'ils méritent. Votre tour viendra. »
languages.original_text: "The Undying One grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."

traits.locale_text: « L'Immortel accorde à ses serviteurs les opportunités qu'ils méritent. Votre tour viendra. »

languages.text: "Ölmeyen, hizmetkârlarına hak ettikleri şansı bahşeder. Senin şansın henüz gelmedi."
languages.original_text: "The Undying One grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."

traits.locale_text: "Ölmeyen, hizmetkârlarına hak ettikleri şansı bahşeder. Senin şansın henüz gelmedi."

languages.text: "Der Todlose gewährt Seinen Dienern die Chancen, die sie verdienen. Eure wird noch kommen."
languages.original_text: "The Undying One grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."

traits.locale_text: "Der Todlose gewährt Seinen Dienern die Chancen, die sie verdienen. Eure wird noch kommen."

languages.text: 「不死の者よ、そのしもべにふさわしいチャンスを与えてください。まだあなたの番は来ません。」
languages.original_text: "The Undying One grants His servants the chances they deserve. Yours is still to come."

traits.locale_text: 「不死の者よ、そのしもべにふさわしいチャンスを与えてください。まだあなたの番は来ません。」
